title: Ajab Raat Ni Gajab Vaat
overview: Kartik is a popular YouTuber known for conducting loyalty tests on women. With a cynical view of relationships, Kartik finds himself involved in an unexpected adventure when his friend Nilay asks for help to elope with his girlfriend.
